title: stylosanthes guianensis subsp. dissitiflora
intro: Stylosanthes guianensis subsp. dissitiflora, also known as the tropical buttonbush or buttonbush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which can be utilized to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Stylosanthes guianensis subsp. dissitiflora include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in the production of traditional medicines.
